# Getting Support

This document explains how to get help with ASUP. Please read through the following guidelines before submitting any issues or support requests.

## 📚 Documentation

Before asking for help, please check our documentation:

- [Getting Started Guide](docs/getting-started.md)
- [Configuration Guide](docs/configuration.md)
- [API Documentation](docs/api.md)
- [Troubleshooting Guide](docs/troubleshooting.md)

## 🔍 Troubleshooting

If you're experiencing issues:

1. Check the [Troubleshooting Guide](docs/troubleshooting.md)
2. Use the debug report tool:
   ```bash
   ./scripts/debug-report.sh
   ```
3. Search existing [Issues](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/issues) and [Discussions](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/discussions)

## 💬 Getting Help

We use GitHub Discussions for community support:

1. **Q&A**: Use the [Q&A section](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/discussions/categories/q-a) for general questions about using ASUP
2. **Ideas**: Share feature requests in the [Ideas section](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/discussions/categories/ideas)
3. **Show and Tell**: Share your success stories in the [Show and Tell section](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/discussions/categories/show-and-tell)

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

If you've identified a bug:

1. Check if it's already reported in [Issues](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/issues)
2. Use our bug report template to provide all necessary information
3. Include the output from `./scripts/debug-report.sh`

## 🔒 Security Issues

For security-related issues:

1. **DO NOT** open a public issue
2. Follow our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md)
3. Report security vulnerabilities through the specified channels

## 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea for improvement?

1. Check existing [Discussions](https://github.com/aperta-be/asup-updater/discussions/categories/ideas)
2. Start a new discussion using our ideas template
3. Engage with the community to refine your proposal

## 👥 Community Support

Ways to engage with the community:

- GitHub Discussions for general questions
- Issue tracker for bug reports
- Pull requests for code contributions
- Project boards for development progress

## 🤝 Commercial Support

While ASUP is an open-source project, we understand some organizations need additional support:

- Consider [sponsoring the project](https://github.com/sponsors/aperta-be)
- Reach out to core maintainers for consulting opportunities
- Join our community of contributors

## ⏱️ Response Times

- **Security Issues**: Within 24 hours
- **Bug Reports**: Within 2-3 business days
- **Feature Requests**: Within 1 week
- **General Questions**: Community-driven response time

## 🌟 Contributing

Want to help others? Consider:

1. Answering questions in Discussions
2. Improving documentation
3. Submitting bug fixes
4. Reviewing pull requests

See our [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md) for more details.

## 📋 Issue Template Checklist

Before submitting an issue, ensure you have:

- [ ] Searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] Read relevant documentation
- [ ] Tried troubleshooting steps
- [ ] Generated a debug report
- [ ] Included all required information

## 🔄 Stay Updated

- Watch the repository for updates
- Follow our [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md)
- Join project discussions
